measurement_notes: Measure only the slotted booster tube.
Measure across the outside of the tube.
Should match the booster tube; still verify it.
Exclude the shoulder that slides inside the payload tube.
Measure at the widest external point.
Length of the fin edge that meets the body tube.
Length of the outer edge parallel to the root chord.
Perpendicular distance from body tube to fin tip.
Axial distance from the root leading edge to the tip leading edge.
Measure one fin; verify the others are the same.
Distance from the booster aft edge to the fin root trailing edge; enter 0 if flush.
Measure fully opened, straight across the canopy.
Dry-fit booster, payload tube, and nose cone; measure aft end to nose tip.
Include paint, adhesive, recovery system, and all installed hardware; exclude motor.
Balance the complete flight-ready rocket without a motor and measure back from the nose tip.
